title: Layout Managers, Resize, Scaling, High DPI, and Reflow
description: The Canvas has fixed pixels, controls vanish on a small window, pack and grid conflict in one parent, and high-DPI text clips. Learners cumulatively produce responsive desktop layout and resize policy through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use one geometry manager per parent and configure grid weights, sticky behavior, minimum sizes, and padding intentionally.
Derive cell size and offsets from current available space, grid dimensions, minimum target, and aspect policy.
Handle configure events with bounded coalescing and redraw only from committed current dimensions.
